title: bindings, build: don't pass invalid platform in case of none
body:
In case of no `platform` , bindings should not add `platform` to parameters at all instead it adds `/` as platform string which is invalid.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
Exsiting test should pass with new buildah from upstream.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4768
Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4769
